subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150616594 is not a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) and B. Mailyan (UAH) report on behalf of the Fermi GBM team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 456156966/150616594
at 14:16:03.39 UT on the 16th of June 2015, tentatively classified 
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles.�
